CONTENT.Club career: On 24 January 2023, Bonga signed with Eintracht Braunschweig for the remainder of the 2022–23 season.He started the 2023–24 season with an appearance against 1. FC Stockheim in the Bavarian Cup. Bonga scored four goals in a Bavarian Cup match against DJK Hain. He was released by the club on 5 January 2024.On 5 January 2024, Bonga signed with Hallescher FC.
CONTENT.Personal life: Born in Germany, Bonga is of Congolese descent. Bonga's younger brother, Isaac, is a professional basketball player for the Bayern Munich.
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played on 5 September 2023

SUMMARY: Tarsis Bonga (born 10 January 1997) is a German professional footballer who plays as a right winger for  club Hallescher FC.
